view.title: Validate explicit UC need #6
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for role-based compensation rules.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 6 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for role-based compensation rules.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for role-based compensation rules.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Role-based compensation rules', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of these rules in the booking process. The existing evidence primarily confirms that bookings were made and the financial outputs were validated, but it does not address the specific requirement of role-based compensation, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive.
